doppler_radar_init.tooltip: Initialize BGT24LTR11 Doppler radar sensor with specified serial port and mode

doppler_radar_set_mode.tooltip: Set the Doppler radar working mode: target detection or I/Q ADC

doppler_radar_target_is.tooltip: Check the target state detected by the Doppler radar

doppler_radar_get_speed.tooltip: Get the target speed detected by the Doppler radar

doppler_radar_set_threshold.message0: Set Doppler radar %1 detection threshold to %2
doppler_radar_set_threshold.tooltip: Set the detection threshold of the Doppler radar (0-65535)

doppler_radar_get_threshold.tooltip: Get the current detection threshold of the Doppler radar

doppler_radar_set_speed_scope.message0:
Set Doppler radar %1 speed range
Max speed %2
Min speed %3
doppler_radar_set_speed_scope.tooltip: Set the speed detection range of the Doppler radar (0-65535)
